Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me identify patterns 1 OR always happens first 2 MS always follows OR 3 QS always follows MS 4 AS always follows QS

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then there is an optional repeated pattern involving IQC and AS Case 1 AS IQC AS once Case 2 AS IQC AS once Case 3 AS IQC IQC AS IQC AS multiple times Case 4 AS TST no IQC Case 5 AS IQC AS IQC AS twice

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Actually looking at the pattern it seems like IQC can happen and then either we go back to AS or we might have multiple IQCs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The pattern seems to be that AS and IQC form a loop do AS then IQC and if it fails do AS again then IQC again etc

Name: Validation - PE

Name: Backtracking - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If we model the IQC AS pattern as a loop between AS and IQC No the loop operator A B executes A first then either exits or does B then A again So if A AS and B IQC then do AS then either exit or do IQC then AS again This would give AS or AS IQC AS or AS IQC AS IQC AS etc This matches cases 1 2 5

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the block before TST is AS optionally followed by one or more IQC followed by AS sequences This is exactly a loop where A AS and B IQC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now what about TST and RT Cases show Case 1 TST RT TST Case 2 TST no RT Case 3 TST RT TST Case 4 TST no RT Case 5 TST RT TST RT TST

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is clearly a loop do TST then optionally do RT and then TST again So TST RT

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now what about LB Case 1 PK LB DP Case 2 PK DP no LB Case 3 PK LB DP Case 4 PK LB DP Case 5 PK LB DP So LB is optional

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is a choice X LB skip where skip is a SilentTransition

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also are there any concurrent activities Lets check OR MS QS are always sequential Then AS IQC loop Then TST RT loop Then PK Then LB optional Then DP Then D Is there any concurrency The problem mentions that POWL supports partial orders and concurrency But in this log everything seems sequential

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
